title: Agent Browser Configuration
description: Configuration file for agent-browser (e.g., agent-browser.json or ~/.agent-browser/config.json)

headed.description: Show browser window instead of running headless.

executablePath.description: Path to a custom browser executable.

extensions.description: Paths to browser extensions. Extensions from user-level and project-level configs are concatenated.

profile.description: Path to the browser profile data directory.

proxyBypass.description: Comma-separated domains to bypass the proxy (e.g., localhost,*.internal.com).

args.description: Additional comma-separated launch arguments for the browser.

stealth.description: Enable stealth mode with anti-detection launch flags and page-runtime patches.

stealthProfile.description: Fingerprint profile used when stealth mode is enabled.

device.description: Device name or identifier for emulation or providers (e.g., 'iPhone 16 Pro').

allowFileAccess.description: Allow file:// URLs to access local files.

autoConnect.description: Auto-discover and connect to a running Chrome instance.

annotate.description: Annotated screenshot with numbered element labels.

contentBoundaries.description: Wrap page output in boundary markers for LLM safety.

maxOutput.description: Max characters for page output (truncates beyond limit).

actionPolicy.description: Path to action policy JSON file.

confirmInteractive.description: Enable interactive confirmation prompts (auto-denies if stdin is not a TTY).

idleTimeout.description: Auto-shutdown the daemon after inactivity (e.g., '30s', '5m', '1h', or raw milliseconds like '60000').

noAutoDialog.description: Disable automatic dismissal of alert/beforeunload dialogs.

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers supplied as a JSON-formatted string.
